title: Web admin integration plan

summary.goal: Replace direct Firebase client SDK usage in web-admin with platform API interfaces while preserving existing behavior and authz constraints.

currentState.firebaseAccessPattern: Client-side Firestore/Auth/Storage/Functions calls are centralized in components/Firebase/Firebase.tsx and consumed across feature containers.
currentState.riskProfile: High migration risk if data-shape and pagination/filter semantics are changed because current screens assume Firestore document structure and optimistic updates.

details: Initializes app auth, firestore, storage, and callable functions region asia-northeast1.
Exposes collection helpers: customers, customerLocations, contractors, customerLocationContractors, oneTimePasscodes, requests, requestInvoicing, assets, leads.
Exposes auth methods: signInWithEmailAndPassword, sendPasswordResetEmail, signOut.
Exposes custom-claim check: isAdmin() using getIdTokenResult().claims.hasAdminAccess.

authAndSession.notes: Return access/refresh tokens and admin authorization payload.
Server-authoritative role response replacing client token-claim parsing.

fileHandling.target: Pre-signed upload/download API via platform storage service
fileHandling.notes: Keep URL contract stable for existing logo rendering.

phasedExecution.name: API contract stabilization
outcomes: Define DTOs and pagination/filter semantics per screen.
Align field names to current Firestore-backed UI model to minimize churn.

phasedExecution.name: Adapter layer introduction
outcomes: Replace direct firebase calls in each container with service methods behind a compatibility interface.

phasedExecution.name: Feature-by-feature migration
outcomes: Migrate Auth, Customers, Contractors, Assets, Landing, Activity in that order.
Gate each migration behind smoke tests and parity checks.

phasedExecution.name: Firebase dependency retirement
outcomes: Remove Firebase SDK usage from web-admin.
Keep only analytics/telemetry integrations if separately required.

gapsAndRisks.risk: Firestore batch semantics and partial failure handling are currently implicit.
gapsAndRisks.mitigation: Expose explicit transactional/batch endpoints with deterministic per-item results.

gapsAndRisks.risk: Callable cloud functions encapsulate business logic not yet reflected in REST surface.
gapsAndRisks.mitigation: Port renewOtp/fetchCustomerSummaryData/fetchCustomerDetailData server logic before UI cutover.

gapsAndRisks.risk: Realtime leads onSnapshot behavior may not match polling APIs.
gapsAndRisks.mitigation: Adopt websocket/SSE stream or short-poll interval with stale-data indicator.

gapsAndRisks.risk: Client-side admin claim checks can drift from server policy.
gapsAndRisks.mitigation: Centralize authorization in platform API and use role payload from /auth/me.

acceptanceCriteria: All web-admin Firebase SDK references are replaced by platform API clients.
Core flows (login, customer/contractor CRUD, asset CRUD, dashboard, activity) preserve existing functional behavior.
OTP renew and activity reporting features are available through platform API equivalents.
Regression checklist and endpoint-to-screen traceability are attached to release evidence.
